en: Katie, she's not pretty. I mean, that sounds bad, but whatever.
The Spring Fling Queen is always pretty. I mean, the crazy thing is, is that it should be Karen,
ko: 스프링 플링 여왕은 항상 예뻐야 해.

en: but people forget about her because she's such a slut.
ko: 사람들이 그녀를 잊어버려, 그녀가 너무 방탕해서. 어쨌든, 나 가야 해.

en: Anyway, I gotta go. I'm going to bed.
Well, she's not mad at you. Hold on. Are you okay?
ko: 그녀는 너에게 화난 게 아니야. 잠깐만.

en: Hello? If someone said something bad about you, you'd want me to tell you, right? No.
ko: 누군가 너에 대해 나쁜 말을 한다면,

en: What if it was someone you thought was your friend? Woody? Hold on. Other line.
ko: 만약 그 사람이 네가 친구라고 생각했던 사람이라면? 우디?

en: I'm not taking this anymore. Good for you, Gretchen. Hello? Let's go out.
Okay, hold on. I'm on the other line with Gretchen. Don't invite Gretchen. She's driving me nuts. Hold on.
She wants to hang out with me tonight, but she told me not to tell you.
Do not hang out with her. Why?
